name: My Name Is Sheela
overview: My Name Is Sheela introduces Sheela, a maid who is anything but conventional. She is fun, quirky, talented, and not afraid of going after what she believes in. She will make you laugh and cry with her witty and emotional remarks. With the help of people who adore her eccentricity, she transforms into a ‘Super Bai’ who takes the internet by storm with her comical acting.

trailers.title: My Name Is Sheela - Trailer | An Eros Now Quickie | All Episodes Streaming Now
